prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily logarithmic returns for LMT over the past 2 years were analyzed to estimate the mean daily return (mu=0.0003) and daily volatility (sigma=0.0124). The forecast period of 18 calendar days was approximated as 13 trading days. The point estimate represents the median expected price, assuming a log-normal distribution of future prices. The confidence intervals are derived from this assumed distribution, reflecting the historical volatility and expected drift over the forecast period.
